The '''Proton carbine''' was a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] usually only used by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
